title: endiandra sericea
intro: Endiandra sericea, also known as the silky bolly gum, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Australia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Endiandra sericea include the potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. The herbal preparations of the plant can be used in various forms, including infusions and tinctures, which are often made from the leaves and bark of the plant.
